watchdog_ngos_searched: Democracy for the Arab World Now (DAWN)
notes: All 13 reputational themes and all 9 watchdog/NGO organisations were searched individually. The only in-window (2026-07-20/21) reputational coverage was the Houthi maritime-blockade story and its adversarial framing of Saudi Arabia (Al Jazeera, NBC/Reuters, Euronews). All NGO/watchdog material surfaced was pre-window (5-15 July) and rejected. One negative item selected for the digest (Al Jazeera 'what to know' explainer carrying the Houthi siege narrative).
